ai_agent_agent_switch_desc: Switching agents will start a new conversation.
ai_agent_disabled_desc: Enable it in settings to start asking questions about your shop.
ai_enabled_desc: AI Analyst is active and ready to answer questions.
ai_disabled_desc: Enable to start asking questions about your shop data.
ai_agent_empty_desc: Get insights on repairs, inventory, revenue, and customers.
ai_agent_empty_featured_hint: Most popular — ask about your shop
ai_agent_new_conversation_desc: Start a new conversation? Current one will be saved.
ai_agent_prompt_customer_history_text: Show a customer's full repair history
ai_agent_prompt_expenses_text: What are my expenses this month?
ai_agent_prompt_profit_margin_text: What are my profit margins by repair type?
ai_agent_prompt_profit_report_text: Show profit report for this month
ai_agent_prompt_sales_trend_text: What's the sales trend this month?
ai_agent_prompt_stock_value_text: What's the total value of my parts inventory?
ai_agent_prompt_top_customers_text: Who are my most frequent customers?
ai_agent_prompt_top_products_text: Which repairs bring in the most revenue?
ai_agent_stream_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ai_assistant_empty_desc: Ask about your repairs, parts stock, or daily earnings.
ai_configuration_desc: Connect and configure your AI assistant
ai_data_scope_desc: Includes 12 months of your shop history and manufacturer repair guides.
ai_defs_active_desc: Inactive agents won't appear in the selector.
ai_defs_description: Manage AI agents with different capabilities.
ai_defs_empty_desc: Create your first agent to get started.
ai_defs_instructions_help: These instructions guide the agent's behavior.
ai_defs_model_help: Leave empty to use the global default model.
ai_defs_temperature_help: 0 = precise, 2 = creative. Leave empty for global default.
ai_defs_keywords_help: Comma-separated keywords that trigger this agent.
ai_defs_name_help: Unique identifier used internally. Use lowercase with underscores.
ai_disclaimer: AI Assistant answers questions using your shop's data.
ai_endpoint_hint: The URL your AI assistant connects to, like https://api.openai.com/v1
ai_history_empty_desc: Start a conversation to see it here.
ai_insight_mock: Revenue is up 12% this month. Want to see which repair type is the most profitable?
ai_instructions_delete_confirm: This instruction will be permanently removed.
ai_instructions_description: Reusable instruction snippets added to agent context.
ai_key_hint: Your access key. Keep it secure — this grants access to the AI service.
ai_memories_delete_confirm: This memory will be permanently removed.
ai_memories_description: Persistent knowledge the AI uses across conversations.
ai_memory_desc: Includes the last 12 months of your shop history and manufacturer service bulletins. This helps the AI give you better, more relevant answers.
ai_mock_response: I'm analyzing that query against your shop data. Based on current trends, I'd recommend prioritizing the open repairs first — there are 3 jobs that have been in the queue for over 24 hours.
ai_settings_description: Configure your AI assistant connection and agents.
ai_settings_enabled_desc: Enable or disable the AI analyst feature.
ai_settings_temperature_hint: Lower = more precise, higher = more creative
ai_settings_url_format_hint: URL should start with http:// or https://
ai_tags_help: Tags help categorize and filter content.
ask_ai_placeholder: Ask about repairs, parts, or daily revenue...
auth_account_disabled: Your account has been deactivated. Contact your shop manager.
auth_change_password_desc: You must set a new password before continuing.
auth_change_password_error: Couldn't change your password. Try again.
auth_change_password_subtitle: You must set a new password before continuing.
auth_forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_hero_desc: Track every repair from check-in to pickup. Manage parts, customers, and your daily work in one place.
auth_identify: Sign in to access your shop.
auth_login_failed_hint: Check your username and password and try again.
auth_metrics_desc: See how your shop is doing, right now.
auth_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_password_requirements: Password must be at least 8 characters with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
auth_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth_reset_expired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
auth_reset_failed: Couldn't send the reset link. Try again.
auth_reset_invalid_link_desc: This password reset link is not valid. Please request a new one from the login page.
auth_reset_invalid_token: This reset link isn't valid. Request a new one.
auth_reset_sent_desc: If an account exists with this email, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
auth_reset_success_desc: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth_start_journey_desc: Equip your workshop with professional-grade tools.
auth_terms: By continuing, you agree to the Reparilo
confirm_activate_desc: It will appear in job creation forms.
confirm_deactivate_desc: It will be hidden from job creation forms.
confirm_market_suggestion: This will update your pricing based on regional market rates.
confirm_tab_switch_desc: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this tab will discard them.
connection_failed: Couldn't connect. Check your connection URL and access key.
customers_desc: Browse and manage your customer directory

dashboard_page.warranty_phantom_touch: Customer reporting digitizer phantom touch after 3 days.

delete_part_confirm_desc: This will permanently remove the part from your catalog. This action cannot be undone.
delete_repair_confirm_desc: This will permanently remove the repair from your catalog. This action cannot be undone.
delete_repair_confirm_desc_named: This will permanently remove "{{name}}" from your catalog. This action cannot be undone.
empty_catalog_desc: Add your first part to start building your inventory.

errors.repair_in_use: Repair is referenced by existing jobs. Deactivate it instead.

errors.outbox_not_queued: Only queued notifications can be cancelled

temperature_note: Use 'Very precise' for part lookups and diagnostic codes.
tracking_cancelled_desc: This repair has been cancelled. Please contact the shop if you have questions.
tracking_error_hint: Double-check your job code and phone number digits.
tracking_guarantee_desc: Your repair comes with a 12-month warranty covering parts and labor. We only use genuine components.
tracking_input_help: Enter the job code from your receipt, e.g. JOB-12345
tracking_job_not_found: Job not found. Check your code and phone number.
tracking_on_hold_desc: Your repair is temporarily on hold. This can happen when we're waiting for information or confirmation. We'll continue as soon as possible.
tracking_phone4_help: Enter the last 4 digits of the phone number you gave the shop
tracking_phone4_placeholder: Last 4 digits of your phone number
tracking_ready_desc: Your repair is complete and your device is ready for pickup. Come by the shop at your convenience.
tracking_returned_desc: This device has been returned. Please contact the shop for details.
tracking_status_on_hold_hint: We'll update you when work resumes
tracking_subtitle: Enter your job code to see the latest status of your device.
try_different_search: Try a different search or filter
users_management_desc: Add and manage your team and what they can do

validations.reason_required: Reason is required for CANCELLED and ON_HOLD
validations.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validations.username_pattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
validations.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validations.password_complexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
validations.at_least_one_field: At least one field is required
validations.brand_too_long: Brand name must be at most 100 characters
validations.model_too_long: Model name must be at most 200 characters
